seoTitle: Turkey Hill vs Two Rocks — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turkey Hill and Two Rocks. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turkey Hill vs Two Rocks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turkey Hill and Two Rocks.
heading: Turkey Hill vs Two Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turkey Hill, Western Australia and Two Rocks, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turkey Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Two Rocks (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turkey Hill or Two Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turkey Hill has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Two Rocks scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turkey Hill scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Two Rocks scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turkey Hill or Two Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turkey Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
